pages.text: Three civic seats. Each caps at one holder. Holders craft regalia exclusive to that seat.$(br2)$(bold)Chancellor.$() Elected. Names the Treasurer and Judge. Unlocks 6 recipes — the Hero helmet, chestplate, leggings, and boots; the Hero Claymore; and the Crown (no other source in the game).$(br2)$(bold)Treasurer.$() Chancellor-appointed. Unlocks 4 Gilded Hunt regalia recipes. Sole minter of all Numismatics currency — Spur, Bevel, Cog, Crown, Sun, Sprocket — none of these drop from anything in the world.$(br2)$(bold)Judge.$() Chancellor-appointed. Unlocks 4 Crucible Knight regalia recipes.
